metadata.title: MindsLeap | Industrial Accelerator for AI-Native Enterprises
metadata.description: MindsLeap is an industrial accelerator for AI-native enterprises. Through AI Club, AI transformation services, startup acceleration, and global growth services, we connect entrepreneurs, industry scenarios, capital, and global resources.

hero.tagline: Upgrade AI Mindsets for Global Success
hero.subtitle: The industrial accelerator for AI-native enterprises
hero.description: Through AI Club, AI transformation services, startup acceleration, and global growth services, we help companies turn AI insight into business execution and help AI-native ventures move from real scenarios to global markets.

valueProp.title: MindsLeap: Joyful Transformation
valueProp.paragraph1: In the AI era, enterprise competition is moving from simply using AI tools to building AI-native organizations. Traditional entrepreneurs need to embed AI into business workflows, organizational capabilities, and new growth curves. AI founders and OPC builders also need real industry scenarios, customers, capital, and global markets to turn technical capability into business outcomes.
valueProp.paragraph2: MindsLeap is the "industrial accelerator for AI-native enterprises." In partnership with Founders Space, we connect entrepreneurs, AI-native founders, industry scenarios, capital, and global resources. Through AI Club, AI transformation services, startup acceleration, and global growth services, we help enterprises move from mindset upgrade to business execution, and help AI-native ventures move from real-world scenarios to global markets.
valueProp.stat1Label: Global Partner of Founders Space, the renowned Silicon Valley incubator
valueProp.quote: Upgrade AI Mindsets for Global Success. Our mission is to accompany traditional enterprises in their AI transformation and help AI-native enterprises grow faster.
valueProp.hoffmanQuote: Founders Space and MindsLeap are coming together to help entrepreneurs and businesses transform with AI.
valueProp.hoffmanRole: Founder and Chairman of Founders Space

about.title: About MindsLeap
about.missionText: Accompany traditional enterprises in AI transformation, and help AI-native enterprises grow faster
about.storyText: MindsLeap is an industrial accelerator for AI-native enterprises, connecting traditional entrepreneurs, AI-native founders, industry scenarios, investors, and global innovation networks.
about.naming: "Minds" represents cognition and thinking, "Leap" represents breakthrough and transformation. MindsLeap: Making AI transformation not painful, but a joyful journey of cognitive upgrade.

acceleratorItems.title: AI Club
acceleratorItems.description: Bring together like-minded entrepreneurs through private salons, workshops, company visits, and industry co-creation to build new AI-era cognition and connections.

acceleratorItems.title: AI Transformation Services
acceleratorItems.description: Provide integrated AI training, consulting, and FDE implementation services to help companies identify high-value scenarios and produce measurable business results.

acceleratorItems.title: Startup Acceleration
acceleratorItems.description: Serve OPC founders, AI-native enterprises, and emerging tech unicorns by connecting industry scenarios, mentor networks, capital, and global markets.

acceleratorItems.title: Global Growth Services
acceleratorItems.description: Help Chinese companies connect with international resources and global growth opportunities through industry visits, overseas market expansion, and global talent services.

about.lincolnBio: Former COO of Emeritus China (a $3.2B global edtech unicorn ranked #1), VP of Marketing at Viking Cruises China. Rich in AI entrepreneurship circles and Silicon Valley resources.
about.yusiBio: Former Head of Product at Emeritus China (a $3.2B global edtech unicorn ranked #1), former Head of Kids Product Line at a Nasdaq-listed education company, and Senior Product Manager for ByteDance's international education business. Led the 0-to-1 development of over 10 products serving millions of users. Rich in Silicon Valley connections and global AI venture resources, skilled at integrating cutting-edge technology with education innovation to drive product and business growth.
about.partnershipText: MindsLeap is a global partner of Founders Space, a global venture platform with strategic partners across 22 countries. Founders Space helps startups, governments, and enterprises leverage AI for innovation and growth.
